text:
Hans may refer to:

Hans - The Commander of the Scout Regiment in the live-action films Attack on Titan, The Movie: Part 1 and Attack on Titan, The Movie: Part 2.
Hans (Garrison Girl) - A member of the Garrison in Garrison Girl: An Attack on Titan Novel.
Hans Luhmann - A member of the Military Police Brigade in Attack on Titan: Before the Fall.
